note: MULTI-CHILD (toddler + newborn). A daycare email names Mia by name — attribute to Mia's id by NAME match. The two children give the classifier a real ambiguity to resolve; the name in the signal is the deciding cue. daycare_communication is a one-way routine comm → surface_only.

input.rawContent:
From: office@maplegrove-childcare.ca
Subject: Mia's nap-mat sheets

Hi! A quick reminder that Mia's nap-mat sheets are due for a wash — please bring them home this Friday and return them clean on Monday. Thanks!
